name: will-finance-5.0
description: 🚀 Sistema de gerenciamento financeiro cyberpunk completo e multiplataforma com React + TypeScript + Vite frontend, NestJS backend, SQLite/PostgreSQL, IA integrada e pronto para Electron/React Native.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=client && npm install --workspace=server && pip install -r IA/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:single: npm run build:client && npm run dev:server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.start:single: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate --workspace=server && npm run db:migrate --workspace=server && npm run db:seed --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=client && npm run test --workspace=server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=client && npm run test:coverage --workspace=server
scripts.health: curl -f http://localhost:8080/health 2>/dev/null && echo ' ✅ Backend OK' || echo ' ❌ Backend Failed'; curl -f http://localhost:5173 2>/dev/null && echo ' ✅ Frontend OK' || echo ' ❌ Frontend Failed'; curl -f http://localhost:8001/health 2>/dev/null && echo ' ✅ IA Service OK' || echo ' ❌ IA Service Failed'
